_comment: 5.5(b) radial Gaussian mass sweep + (N,H) self-convergence grid. This file DESCRIBES the experiment grid; simulation_focusing.py is driven by CLI flags (one run per (M,N,H,tau,seed) tuple). run_focusing.sb expands this grid. No universal critical-mass claim: this is a family-dependent focusing transition over the one-parameter mass family.

model.equation: d_t rho = Delta rho - chi div(rho grad c);  -Delta c + kappa^2 c = rho - rho_bar

self_convergence.note: Q_c(t) = ||c_{H_hi}||_inf / ||c_{H_lo}||_inf from the SAME cloud; reported per (N,H) to expose under-resolution. H=32 only if stable.

production_note: Recommended primary grid for the figures: M in {20,40,60,80,100} at N=8e5, H=24, tau=1e-4, seeds {0,1,2}; plus an (N,H) self-convergence sub-grid at M=80 over N in {2e5,8e5,3.2e6}, H in {12,18,24,32}.
